title: Shower Head and 1.5m Chrome Shower Hose High Pressure Shower Head with 3 Spray Modes Water Saving Bathing Turbocharged Design for Universal Handheld Showerhead for Bathroom
features: 【3 MODEL MASSAGE FLOW】Shower Head is 3 massage model Pulsating Massage, Eco Rain, Powerful Rain. The water saving and pressure boosting design are suitable for adults, children and pets, for home, spa, hotel, gym and other bathing places use.

【WATER SAVING AND PRESSURE BOOSTING】This water saving shower head is designed to spray thinner streams than typical ones, saves about 40% water in daily shower. And with water pressure boosting effect, our product provides a better bath time.
【150 CM CHROME SHOWER HOSE】We use high quality stainless steel hose with the solid brass connection fittings that won't crack or split. Especially suitable for hard water areas.

【DETACHABLE AND LEAKING PREVENT】Our powerful flow spray shower head can be detached, makes it easy to clear out the impurities causing the blocking. When installed properly, the filtration shower head is leaking prevent. This is a simple spray shower head with practicality and reliability.

【CUSTOMER SERVICE GUARANTEE】We are doing our best to secure every part of your purchasing. Please feel free to contact us should questions and issues occur. Our professional service team will give you a satisfactory answer and a refund for broken and faulty product.
description: Product Description 3 Spray mode Massaging Spray Massaging Spray mode invigorates and refreshes with its pleasant, powerful way with which it hits the body. This makes it ideal for rinsing shampoo quickly and well, for example. Full body Spray The Full body Spray jet easily releases tense areas. The concentrated jet lets away the efforts of everyday life. Full Spray with Massage When showering, the powerful water supply is ideal for pleasant skin stimulation. And after showering, you can easily clean the shower or bathtub with the same function. Detailed Analysis Fast anti-limescale function Easy-to-clean overhead shower: Fast anti-limescale function. Limescale can be rubbed off easily by the knobs. Advanced water intake Universal hand shower with standard 1/2 inch standard connection, backflow prevention design brings you a healthy and comfortable shower experience. Multi - chrome Surface treatment : Chrome-plated body, Acetate spray test up to 9 levels (ASS24H up to 9), Strong resistance to salt spray corrosion. Easy to install The hose interface is non-slip, easy to install and can be easily installed even when your hands are covered with water.
